arts.ttl: Bayern Munich XI vs Inter – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Bayern Munich travel to Inter Milan aiming to overturn a one-goal deficit in their Champions League quarter-final tie. It was late heartbreak for Bayern at the Allianz Arena last week, as Davide Frattesi scored an 88th-minute winner for Inter. arts.ttl: Inter Milan vs Bayern Munich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Inter Milan welcome Bayern Munich to the San Siro tonight with a 2-1 lead in their Champions League quarter-final tie. Davide Frattesi scored a dramatic late winner in the first leg in Germany, to give the Italians a narrow advantage ahead of this evening’s return.
